name: Pearl Continental Lahore
review_text: I had a very bad experience in nearby hotel. I decided to move in this hotel and made my room booking on phone. When I reached here I found that the rate they gave me was lower. I argued with them but due to psl going on in city they raised room rate without letting me know. I had to settle my family in our relatives home as there was no room available in hotels of gulberg

name: Avari Hotel Lahore
review_text: we enjoyed here very well.awesome atmosphere and marvelous service provided by staff in restaurant specially sayyad naveed and asif food was amazing .delicious taste we will come back again and again ...keep it up nice standards pc especially marcopolo staff..

name: Beach Luxury Hotel
review_text: We were stay in hotel one faisalabad it was a great stay. The team of that hotel were very professional and service was also good. Neat nd clean room and when we entered the hotel they welcomed with beautiful smile nd offer welcom drink. we really enjoyed all stay.

name: Islamabad Serena Hotel
review_text: Excellent for family time. You have 100s of activities lined up. Awesome water park and delicious food as well. Its exciting for all age groups and has clean chalets to live in as well. Worth a visit

name: Movenpick Hotel Karachi
review_text: Lack of professorial staff need training , GPS finding of the location is very difficult.very bad experience in Lahore for the first time during night stay at Lahore . Room was comfortable . Breakfast no taste I think not good as compare to other 5 star hotels in Lahore

name: Centaurus Suites
review_text: Stayed in executive lounge 307. Experience wasn㦙 very pleasant. Instead of traditional reception counter, tables with insufficient staff as well as chairs were placed. Had to wait extra ordinary long to get my room allocated. Rooms were too congested. Telephone set placed on the bedside table was out of order. Bathroom fittings(taps etc) were not comfortable for use.

name: Royal Inn Hotel
review_text: I had a very pleasant experience. I went there with my friends and as we were more than the bed could occupy they provided us with mattresses. Even though we were the only ones there at night they still opened the rides for us. We had some problem with the cable so they immediately responded to our request and fixed it in no time.

name: Avari Xpress Gulberg
review_text: Ive spent 5 nights. During the first 3, the swimming pool didnt work for maintenance. The remaining days the steam bath did not work either. The restaurant is full of noisy families. Too many managers who scarcely pass the information to each other. In the restaurant you can be waiting for 30 minutes a mocktail. The swimming pool is too small for the too many members of the fitness club who instead of swimming behave as teenagers. I would not recommend it for business travellers who want a calm place after work

name: Pearl Continental Hotel Malam Jabba
review_text: I stayed with my family of four in Movenpick Hotel in Karachi between July 17th to August 6th, 2022. The hotel is great and the staff is very cooperative. Abdul Bari Sheikh did a great job for me, before we arrived, he did make sure my reservation is confirmed, arranged rental car and did setup hotel shuttle services airport/hotel. I have seen many hotels in USA and would give this Hotel Five Star. Azeem - USA

name: Hotel One Mall Road Murree
review_text: Movenpick breakfast is very tasty and the staff are very friendly and helpful. Particularly Nr Khorramshahr Abbasi and Mr Javaid who kindly introduced me to some of the Movenpick𠏋 breakfast specialties.

name: Luxus Grand Hotel
review_text: Excellent for both business and leisure - overall a happy experience. This hotel works as a unit and seems constantly striving to make the guests feel welcome and comfortable. Food is excellent. Left refreshed and recharged. There is however no gym facility.

name: Lahore Continental Hotel
review_text: We loved every minute at this hotel, the staff was super friendly and the food was amazing. This hotel is a must stay if you𠆫e visiting gilgit, they have everything on site at all times including a doctor or taxi at anytime. They have amazing staff and the stores on site offer a beautiful selection of products in the hotel itself

name: Seven Star Hotel
review_text: Dreamworld visited last month with friends and find it must go place once a while to get relaxed and have a blast. Next trip will be with the family soon. I must Mention Mr. Iftikhar really a gem made it feel like home for us. He is an asset to Dreamworld and knows how to deal and co op with customers

name: Avari Xpress Islamabad
review_text: Old dated rooms - current state of hotel rooms is no more than 3*. Even though I had a deluxe room, the view was horrible and looked over the roof and all the Utilities. Only thing that is perhaps left of this hotel is the name of this property. There are better options in Lahore than staying here'

name: Ramada Plaza by Wyndham Karachi Airport Hotel
review_text: Washroom accessories too dirty and there are no tiles installed in washroom floor. Room service too slow. I called 4 times on reception for checkout after that they come kindly upgrade your rooms quality

name: Indigo Heights Hotel & Suites
review_text: A good hotel with great rooms and courteous staff. The gym facilities are excellent and both pools are nice. It also has great open spaces and the gardens are exquisite.The quality of the food in the restaurants with the change of Executive Chef has nosedived and the levels of cleanliness in the restaurants and rooms need attention

name: Hotel Crown Inn
review_text: I have been visiting this place for past few years.Its good hotel to stay in this area.The staff has always been very nice and welcoming.Specail appreciation for Zeeshan,Farah,Fida,Areej , Kamran and Mr Zafar.Keep it up ??

name: Hotel One Mm Alam Road
review_text: Had terrible experience in front of my clients, there was a whole in bed, and the rooms were not clean as they should be. The housekeeping department is very slow. Not staying in P.C Peshawar in future. Feel embarrassed, and my clients were mad at me why i choosed this hotel. Never doing business with P.C Peshawar anymore

name: Pearl-Continental Hotel Peshawar
review_text: Nice Room with courtesies Being a hotelier would recommend to my colleagues and family. Would revisit again in near future. Parking was a concern but staff is always very cooperative.Well groomed and warm welcoming

name: Hotel One Tower Gulberg - Lahore
review_text: We had a awesome stay at Ramada Multan. Rooms were comfortable with nice lobby ambiance.Guest Relation Ms was very accommodating. Breakfast was lovely. Hope to stay again .We really enjoyed here.Thank you

name: Reina Boutique Hotel - G6/3
review_text: very nice and quiet place with a fitness area and swimming pool outside. High;ly recommend this place to stay in Lahore ,WLAN free of charge and very fast TV rooms are big and clean , very good service.... breakfast also on good level ..its a pity no traditional espresso available :)

name: Hotel One Sargodha
review_text: Great hospitality and facilities. Superb breakfast and dinners. Comfortable and spacious rooms.The feel of the hotel was great but I𠍿 sure that eventually a slight update in decor would improve the aura of the place.

name: Hotel Elites
review_text: All in all a wonderful experience, from check in to check-out, breakfast menu is decent its a beautiful property with all the facilities Specialy front office & H&K staff i love it its my like a second home.Highly recommended hotel one Ryk

name: Park View Hotel Gulberg
review_text: I have very good experience with PC pindi theyneed upgradation but there services are commendable specially PC pindi staff reception staff is very obedient and warm welcoming staff.all the time they are smiling proefficient staff

name: Roomy Signature Hotel, Islamabad
review_text: Stayed 2 nights in a family suite that had ample room to relax like we were at home.The food was great, the service was top notch and once again, the views are just, stunning.Celebrated my 21st Birthday at this absolutely beautiful hotel on December 24th of 2017 and it𠏋 something that I would never forget

name: Hotel Move N Pick
review_text: Good service humble reception .....Ideal location near Airport ....Highly recommendable.......Breakfast lunch and dinner are highly hygineic .Good family environment ...privacy is fully protected ....trips are also arranged along with pick up and drop facility to the airport ...
